description: Core automation orchestration — queues, assets, triggers, machines, environments, processes, jobs

defaultRemediationTemplate.reason: Core Orchestrator service is not accessible.
defaultRemediationTemplate.recommendedStep: Verify connection credentials and ensure the External Application has OR.Default scope.

description: Human-in-the-loop tasks, approvals, escalations, SLA management

defaultRemediationTemplate.reason: Action Center is not enabled on this tenant.
defaultRemediationTemplate.recommendedStep: Enable Action Center in UiPath Automation Cloud admin settings.

description: File storage for input/output documents, templates, logs

defaultRemediationTemplate.reason: Storage Buckets feature is not accessible.
defaultRemediationTemplate.recommendedStep: Create at least one Storage Bucket in Orchestrator.

description: Runtime environments for process execution

defaultRemediationTemplate.recommendedStep: Configure runtime environments in Orchestrator.

description: Queue triggers and process schedules

defaultRemediationTemplate.recommendedStep: Ensure queue triggers or process schedules are configured in Orchestrator.

description: Automated test projects, test cases, test execution, regression suites

defaultRemediationTemplate.recommendedStep: Add the TestManager resource with TM.* scopes to your External Application in UiPath Admin.

description: Intelligent document processing, OCR, ML classification, data extraction

defaultRemediationTemplate.recommendedStep: Add the UiPath.DocumentUnderstanding resource with Du.* scopes to your External Application.

description: LLM-powered extraction for unstructured documents — contracts, reports, correspondence

defaultRemediationTemplate.recommendedStep: Enable IXP on your tenant and add the Ixp.ExternalService resource with Ixp.ApiAccess scope.

description: Email/message stream analysis, intent detection, sentiment analysis, intelligent routing

defaultRemediationTemplate.recommendedStep: Enable Communications Mining on your tenant and add the Ixp.ExternalService resource with Ixp.ApiAccess scope.

description: Structured data entities, schema-driven storage, cross-process data persistence

defaultRemediationTemplate.recommendedStep: Add the DataFabricOpenApi resource with DataFabric.* scopes to your External Application.

description: BPMN process orchestration, process apps, case management, service tasks

defaultRemediationTemplate.recommendedStep: Enable Maestro on your tenant and add the PIMS resource with PIMS.* scopes.

description: Custom ML models for classification, prediction, NLP, anomaly detection

defaultRemediationTemplate.recommendedStep: Add the UiPath.AICenter resource with AIC.* scopes to your External Application in UiPath Admin.

description: AI agent definitions, tool bindings to Orchestrator processes, context grounding

defaultRemediationTemplate.recommendedStep: Enable Agent Builder in UiPath Automation Cloud and add the ConversationalAgents resource to your External Application.

description: AI-powered automation assistance

defaultRemediationTemplate.recommendedStep: Enable Autopilot in Agent Builder settings.

description: Idea management, ROI estimation, automation pipeline, CoE collaboration

defaultRemediationTemplate.recommendedStep: Enable Automation Hub on your tenant. Note: Automation Hub uses its own OAuth token, separate from the External Application.

description: 500+ pre-built connectors to enterprise systems (SAP, Salesforce, ServiceNow, Microsoft 365, etc.)

defaultRemediationTemplate.reason: Integration Service does not support External Application OAuth access.
defaultRemediationTemplate.recommendedStep: Integration Service connectors are discovered opportunistically but cannot be managed via External Application OAuth. No user action is available.

description: Governance policies, deployment rules, environment management

defaultRemediationTemplate.recommendedStep: Enable Automation Ops on your tenant. Governance policies are accessed via Platform Management token (PM.* scopes).

description: Reusable components, workflow templates, marketplace

defaultRemediationTemplate.reason: Automation Store does not have a documented External Application API.
defaultRemediationTemplate.recommendedStep: Automation Store does not support External Application API access. No user action is available.

description: Low-code app builder, custom UIs for automations, forms and dashboards

defaultRemediationTemplate.reason: UiPath Apps does not have a documented External Application API.
defaultRemediationTemplate.recommendedStep: UiPath Apps does not support External Application API access. No user action is available.

description: Robot tray, attended automation triggers, process launcher for end users

defaultRemediationTemplate.reason: UiPath Assistant is a desktop client without a documented cloud API for External Applications.
defaultRemediationTemplate.recommendedStep: UiPath Assistant is primarily a desktop application. No External Application API is available.

description: Security settings, auth settings, OAuth app management, robot accounts

defaultRemediationTemplate.recommendedStep: Add the PlatformManagement resource with PM.* scopes to your External Application.

description: Intelligent document processing and communications mining platform

defaultRemediationTemplate.recommendedStep: Add the Ixp.ExternalService resource with Ixp.ApiAccess scope.

description: Human-assisted desktop automation robots detected from Orchestrator Robots API
Existing deployed processes detected from Orchestrator Processes API
Unattended robot slots detected from Orchestrator Machines API
